title: Oaks Nature
body:
# Disclaimer, this mod is currently discontinued

## 📖About:

Oak's Nature aims to expand on the Nature side of Minecraft, adding new Blocks and Items, and bringing your world to life with the slightest of detail. Currently Adding loads of unique blocks and plants with an everlasting development cycle. With the support of the community, this mod could forever expand.

## ✅Features:

Brush - Comes in Wood, Gold and Diamond, use this tool to brush away dirt, gravel and sand. (com' w/ Create).\
Leaf Piles - Leaf piles are decorative blocks (find each variant in the correct biome).\
Hollow Logs -  Sneak Right-click a log with an axe to hollow it out. works similarly to standard logs.\
Limestone - Found in stone, it's similar to other stone types.\
Vase - Crafted with clay, cooked over something hot.\
New Log variants (Fence, Gates, Stairs and Slabs).\
Bamboo Fence - it's a bamboo fence.\
Shear Saplings to make dead bushes.
